pages.text: Home-grown stairs down. A small island whose centre is punched through with a $(item)ladder$() shaft — backed by a cobblestone wall and hanging some $(bold)20 blocks$() below to a little $(item)cobblestone$() landing at mining level. No more bridging out over the void to find a way down.

It takes the look of wherever it lands — grass, sand, snow — and grows in every dimension (a netherrack nub in the Nether, end stone in the End). $(br)$(br)$(o)Rarely, the ladders come up as a waterfall instead.$()
